expectations.text: A new file docs/notes/us###.md was created
Filename slug is us<NNN>.md with three-digit zero-padded id
Frontmatter aliases entry is a human-readable title describing the pick action
expectations.evidence: Title field in YAML entry only; no frontmatter aliases
Status in YAML entry, not zettel frontmatter

expectations.text: ## role wikilink either references an existing persona alias (e.g. requestor, approver) OR a newly-created pn### that matches 'picker' or 'warehouse'
expectations.evidence: Role recorded as plain string 'warehouse picker', no wikilink, no pn### zettel created

expectations.text: ## want describes marking the request as picked
## because gives a non-empty motivation (mentions handoff or ready-for-pickup)
expectations.evidence: Captured in YAML field, not body

expectations.text: ## acceptance_criteria has at least 1 bullet (derived if user did not specify, with disclosure)
expectations.evidence: Captured in YAML list, not body bullets
